subject: Vanta — SOC 2 Type II readiness review

messages.subject: Vanta — your SOC 2 Type II readiness review
messages.body_text:
Hi Nina,

Following up on your SOC 2 Type I completion in October — I want to help you plan your path to Type II.

What you need:
1. A minimum 6-month observation window (you're on track — observation started Oct 15)
2. An auditor engaged before the window closes
3. Remediation of the controls flagged as 'partial' in your Type I

Based on your Oct 15 start, earliest possible Type II completion is mid-April 2026. For a June 30 commitment to a customer, that is achievable — but you need to engage an auditor now. Auditors book out 2–3 months.

I'd like to schedule 30 minutes to walk through the open controls and auditor options. Are you or Priya available next week?

I'm attaching your readiness report.

— Alex Morrison
Customer Success, Vanta
alex.morrison@vanta.com

messages.subject: Fwd: Vanta SOC 2 Type II — we need to move on this
messages.body_text:
Priya, Marcus,

Forwarding from our Vanta CSM. Key takeaway: if we want SOC 2 Type II done by June 30 (which we committed to Meridian), we need to engage an auditor now — the window is already running and auditors are booked 2–3 months out.

Also flagged: a few 'partial' controls from our Type I still need remediation. Marcus — I believe at least two are on the engineering side (access logging, encryption key rotation).

Can we all get on a call with Alex next week?

— Nina Kowalski
Ops & People, Vectrix Labs
nina@vectrix.io

messages.subject: Re: Fwd: Vanta SOC 2 Type II — we need to move on this
messages.body_text:
Yes — set up the call with Alex for next week. Marcus and I will both join.

Marcus — before the call, can you pull the open engineering controls from the Vanta dashboard? I don't want Meridian asking about this in the Feb 19 SOW call and us not knowing exactly where we stand.

— Priya Chandran
CEO, Vectrix Labs
priya@vectrix.io
